name: Admiral's Gumshoes
description: The clicks of these sharp heels echo on the deck of every ship.
dropLocation: Captive of the Hidden God, end chest

name: Anger's Step
description:
This pair of boots is said to give speed to hearty warriors when they are called
upon.

name: Asbestos Booties
description:
Heavy, cumbersome boots that enable their wearer to trod red-hot coals and other
burning debris.

name: Ash Boots
description: These black leather boots leave a trail of footsteps filled with ash.
dropLocation: Litany of the Dead, Cinnis ' chest

name: Azure Guard
description:
Made of lighter scale than one would expect, these boots help their bearers
avoid detection and harm.
dropLocation: Riding the Storm Out, Warded chest

name: Balanced Boots
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .

name: Beachcombers
description: Light, airy, and full of black sand.

name: Blackfeather Boots
description:
Formed of exquisite blackened feathers, these boots are enchanted to help you
take flight

name: Boots of Anchoring
description:
Crafted by Liella d'Orien, these boots ward against time and planar displacement
effects.
dropLocation: Crafted, Crafted in Amrath by Liella d'Orien

name: Boots of Blessed Travels
description:
When lives are on the line, the wise strap on these greaves to rush to the front
lines.
dropLocation: Defiler of the Just, warded chest

name: Boots of Corrosion
description:
These boots are filled with caustic, entropic power. They appear to have almost
fallen apart from containing such energy.

name: Boots of Faith
description: These boots inspire their wearer to ascend great heights.
dropLocation: The Crypt of Gerard Dryden, End chest

name: Boots of Fleet and Fortune
description:
Discarded by an adventurer who thought the Ruins would be an easy ticket to
riches, these boots may give a new bearer a kinder fate.

name: Boots of Grounding
description:
These copper-plated boots were developed to protect the wearer from sudden lightning
storms.
dropLocation: The Haunted Halls of Eveningstar, On the ground near Doppleganger's chest

name: Boots of Minor Striding
description: Leather boots that increase movement speed.
dropLocation: Special event items, DDO Stormreach: Collector's Edition Bonus Item

name: Boots of Nimbleness
description: These magical boots are sturdy and tough, but extremely light.
dropLocation: Stopping the Sahuagin, Chest at Devourer altar near the Giantish device.

name: Boots of Speed
description:
Leather boots that give their wearer the ability to cast the Haste spell twice
a day.
dropLocation: Random, Found only in low level loot, ~level 6 loot tables

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
description:
These boots increase the wearer's land speed by +15% and give a +5 competence
bonus to the Jump skill.
dropLocation: Random, rare drop in any Loot Level 9 Chest/Reward

name: Boots of the Battlemaster
description:
The boots of the Night Brigade Battlemaster, Agarta the Breaker. These provide
unparalleled agility.
dropLocation: Rats in a Cage, end chest

name: Boots of the Devil Commander
description:
It would be a shame to let these boots go to waste just because their former
owner is dead.

name: Boots of the Innocent
description:
These boots belonged to an ancient nobleman's son. Kidnapped from Stormreach,
he was sacrificed to Vol in this shrine. His ghost haunts the remains of the
shrine.
dropLocation: Desecrated Temple of Vol, end chest

name: Boots of the Long Step
description: Supple leather boots with worn soles.
dropLocation: Retrieve the Stolen Goods, Kharnos ' chest

name: Boots of the Mire
description: These boots were designed to ease travel through swampy, water-logged regions.

name: Boots of the Rose
description:
These boots are crafted of swirling thorns and rose petals, hand grown from
some druidic magic.

name: Boots of the Woodsman
description: These supple leather boots are as swift and silent as the falling night.
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 5 Commendations: Druids of the King's Forest Commendation: Druids of the King's Forest : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the Druids of the King's Forest. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: Boots of Tranquility
description: Strong, stable, and stylish.

name: Boots of Uncanny Mending
description:
Small tools kept in the sides of these boots aid their wearer in the repair
of items.

name: Cannith Crafted Boots
description: This is a Cannith crafted set of boots.

name: Cannith Boots of Propulsion
description:
Footwear manufactured by House Cannith. Marvels of technology, these boots cause
their wearer to run faster and fall more slowly. They can even provide a powerful
boost to propel the wearer through the air, though it takes a while for them
to recharge.
dropLocation: Schemes of the Enemy, Dackle's chest, some end chests (hard or elite difficulty only)

name: Cerulean Guard
description: These scale boots can help their bearers to endure many physical attacks.
dropLocation: Riding the Storm Out, warded chest

name: Chamber Boots
description:
These boots were left in an unattended closet of the Chamber, and seem to be
exactly your size.

name: Clockwork Boots
description: These carry a subtle heat, as if they were still warm from the forge.
dropLocation: Heart of the Problem, end chest

name: Cobalt Guard
description:
The scales on these boots have the strange effect of nullifying magics that
would harm their owners.
dropLocation: Riding the Storm Out, Warded chest

name: Coldlight Runners
description:
You don't need to be swift - you just need to be swifter than the Coldlight
Walkers.
dropLocation: A Light in the Attic, end chest

name: Corsair's Galoshes
description: These boots are thigh-high and waterproof. Good for keeping your feet dry.

name: Crocodile Skin Boots
description:
Sturdy waterproof boots for the adventurer who doesn't mind the risk involved
in obtaining the materials.
dropLocation: Swim at Your Own Risk, end chest

name: Death's Deferral
description: The power to deny death is sought by many, but few understand its cost.
dropLocation: Threats Old and New, Raid Warded chest

name: Deepsnow Boots
description: These boots are perfect for navigating extreme weather.
dropLocation: A Frosty Reception, End chest, Frost Giant chest

name: Dinosaur Bone Boots
description: Fashioned of intricately carved bones of long-forgotten Dinosaurs.
dropLocation: The Isle of Dread, any legendary chest; or Dread saga legendary end reward

name: Doctor Gustav's Rubber Boots
description:
A damaged pair of galoshes, likely meant to protect the good Doctor from electrical
experiments.

name: Dustless Boots
description: Subtle transmutative magic causes the wearer's footprints to erase themselves.

name: Epic Boots of Corrosion
description:
These boots are filled with caustic, entropic power. They appear to have almost
fallen apart from containing such energy.
dropLocation: Epic version of Boots of Corrosion

name: Epic Boots of Faith
description: These boots inspire their wearer to ascend great heights.
dropLocation: The Crypt of Gerard Dryden, End chest

name: Epic Boots of the Innocent
description:
These boots belonged to an ancient nobleman's son. Kidnapped from Stormreach,
he was sacrificed to Vol in this shrine. His ghost haunts the remains of the
shrine.
dropLocation: Desecrated Temple of Vol (epic), end chest

name: Epic Boots of the Mire
description: These boots were designed to ease travel through swampy, water-logged regions.
dropLocation: Epic version of Boots of the Mire

name: Epic Crocodile Skin Boots
description:
Sturdy waterproof boots for the adventurer who doesn't mind the risk involved
in obtaining the materials.
dropLocation: Epic version of Crocodile Skin Boots

name: Epic Dustless Boots
description: Subtle transmutative magic causes the wearer's footprints to erase themselves.

name: Epic Firestorm Greaves
description:
Greaves fashioned from the finest steel and the essence of fire. These greaves
can protect their wearer from most forms of magical fire.

name: Epic Golden Greaves
description: These gold-plated greaves are embossed with a boar's head sigil.

name: Epic Kundarak Delving Boots
description:
These boots are Kundarak-forged and useful for exploring (and infiltrating)
secure spaces.
dropLocation: Epic version of Kundarak Delving Boots

name: Epic Rock Boots
description:
These boots are encased in a stony shell, bolstered by the power of a bound
Earth Elemental. They allow the user to execute a ferocious stomp that knocks
nearby enemies over, as well as turning your attackers to stone on occasion.
dropLocation: Vaults of the Artificers, Turn in various ingredients

name: Epic Ship Kickers
description: Boots worn by the crew to get the airship ready for flight.

name: Epic Sparksoles
description: A light crackle follows each footfall.

name: Epic Steelweave Shinguards
description:
Reliable for hiking, these curious boots also feature grounding metal that can
alter the flow of electrical energy.
dropLocation: Kind of a Big Deal, End Chest

name: Epic Switchblade Boots
description:
The toes of these boots are fitted with spring-loaded blades, a nasty surprise
for the unwary opponent.

name: Expeditious Boots
description: These magical boots are said to make a person capable of amazing boosts of speed.
dropLocation: Stopping the Sahuagin, Chest at Devourer altar near the Giantish device.

name: Experimental Rocket Boots
description:
A tinkerer built these, but unfortunately forgot to build in a way to stop.
They then built the brakes with a broken arm.

name: Faded Tracker's Boots
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .

name: Firestorm Greaves
description:
Greaves fashioned from the finest steel and the essence of fire. These greaves
can protect their wearer from most forms of magical fire.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Commander Errulf 's Chest (Rare Encounter) ; 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: Flightfoot Greaves
description: Be the wind in the trees.

name: Flower Boots
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Thorn Boots 

A pair of boots with living vines and calm flowers wound around them.

name: Footfalls of the Dracolich
description: Each step of these worn boots leaves a cold, lingering echo.
dropLocation: Threats Old and New, Raid Warded chest

name: Giyar's Boots of Dashing
description: These will help you acquire some additional, necessary velocity.

name: Goatskin Boots (level 17)
description: Before it met its end, this animal had only one thought. Escape.
dropLocation: What Goes Up, end chest, jeweled key chest (heroic normal)

name: Goatskin Boots (Level 18)
description: Before it met its end, this animal had only one thought. Escape.
dropLocation: What Goes Up, end chest, jeweled key chest (heroic hard)

name: Goatskin Boots (Level 19)
description: Before it met its end, this animal had only one thought. Escape.
dropLocation: What Goes Up, end chest, jeweled key chest (heroic elite)

name: Goatskin Boots (Level 26)
description: Before it met its end, this animal had only one thought. Escape.
dropLocation: What Goes Up, end chest, jeweled key chest (epic normal); The Secret of the Storm Horns, quest chain end reward (epic)

name: Goatskin Boots (Level 27)
description: Before it met its end, this animal had only one thought. Escape.
dropLocation: What Goes Up, end chest, jeweled key chest (epic hard)

name: Goatskin Boots (Level 28)
description: Before it met its end, this animal had only one thought. Escape.
dropLocation: What Goes Up, end chest, jeweled key chest (epic elite)

name: Golden Greaves
description: These gold-plated greaves are embossed with a boar's head sigil.
dropLocation: Chains of Flame, Valgrim Forge-Bound 's Chest

name: Gravedigger's Greaves
description: TBD.

name: Gravekeeper's Greaves
description: A set of sturdy boots made to kick through dirt with ease.

name: Greaves of Seasons' Warding
description: Made to withstand the harshest of any season, these aged boots show no wear.

name: Green Steel Weave Boots
description: Boots lined with cloth woven with threads of green steel.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Grundok's Boots
description: These magical boots were taken from the chest of the bugbear Grundok.
dropLocation: The Kobolds' New Ringleader, Grundok the Quick 's chest

name: Guardian's Boots (Level 15)
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .

name: Guardian's Boots (Level 27)
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .

name: Gyroscopic Boots of Striding
description: A pair of leather and metal boots that offer stability and speed to its wearer.

name: Halcyon Boots
description:
A sensation of peace and tranquility flows through you while wearing these boots.
It seems the giants have found a way to calm the chaotic energies of the Madstone,
safely focusing its power toward more productive ends, The polished orbs of
crystal worked into these boots no longer possess the dangerous side-effects
of Madstone.
dropLocation: The Fall of Truth, raid warded chest (epic normal)

name: Hardy Boots
description: These will take a few hits on your behalf.

name: Hobnail Boots
description: A pair of rugged leather workboots. Their soles are studded with sharp cleats.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Hooves of the Nightmare
description: Where dreams run, the night's terrible horse goes.

name: Icewalkers
description: For traversing the winter's drifts.

name: Knife Toed Boots
description:
A pair of sturdy boots with a knife protruding from the front if you kick the
heel just right.
dropLocation: Memoirs of an Illusory Larcener, End Chest

name: Krugg's Spiked Boots
description:
These boots are fitted with dark metal spikes. They were once worn by Krugg,
warmaster of Splinterskull.

name: Kundarak Delving Boots
description:
These boots are Kundarak-forged and useful for exploring (and infiltrating)
secure spaces.

name: Legendary Admiral's Gumshoes
description: The clicks of these sharp heels echo on the deck of every ship.
dropLocation: Captive of the Hidden God, end chest

name: Legendary Beachcombers
description: Light, airy, and full of black sand.

name: Legendary Boots of Corrosion
description:
These boots are filled with caustic, entropic power. They appear to have almost
fallen apart from containing such energy.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope (Legendary), end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Boots of Corrosion

description: For traversing the winter's drifts.

description:
These boots are Kundarak-forged and useful for exploring (and infiltrating)
secure spaces.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Kundarak Delving Boots

name: Legendary Lightning Railworker's Boots
description:
The perfect boots for those who wish to work hard and expect to withstand a
massive electric shock. Or ten. In one day.

name: Legendary Magma Waders
description: Stone boots that seem to absorb the heat.
dropLocation: The Trouble with Tar Pits, end chest

name: Legendary Red Dragonscale Boots
description:
These boots are crafted out of Red Dragonscale, and have an incredible tolerance
for heat.

name: Legendary Scarletscale Boots
description: These scale boots keep one's feet perpetually warm, even in the deepest snow.
dropLocation: Burning Down the House, end chest

name: Legendary Shackles
description: To hold one back, is to give them strength through freedom.
dropLocation: Assault on the Aerie of the Slave Lords, Small chest, End chest

name: Legendary Shadow Sprinters
description: Take a step into the ethereal.

name: Legendary Shadow's Footsteps
description: Move like the night, silent and omnipresent.
dropLocation: Sealed in Amber, End chest & optional draw Strahd's attention chest

name: Legendary Skymage's Shoes
description:
While a Skymage certainly needs a great deal of magic, they also need the ability
to move with grace.

name: Legendary Softsole Slippers
description: Not a sound was heard. Ever, again.
dropLocation: Wrath of the Earth, End Chest

name: Legendary Sparksoles
description: A light crackle follows each footfall.
dropLocation: Down You Go, end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Sparksoles

name: Legendary Spectre Boots
description: These are enchanted to help guide your footsteps.

name: Legendary Steel-Toed Steps
description: Lighter than they look and exactly as tough as they look.

name: Legendary Stone Shoes
description: They sink in water.

name: Legendary Sunken Slippers
description: These are pretty damp. Ew.

name: Legendary Thief's Escape
description: For when one must go quickly.

name: Legendary Thorn Boots
description: A pair of boots with living vines and angry thorns wound around them.

name: Legendary Warded Sewer Waders
description:
These boots help the user ward off sicknesses one might acquire in the sewers.
Given that they were dredged up from its depths without their user, they seem
less effective at warding off the sewers' inhabitants.

name: Legendary Windriders
description: Ride the wind.
dropLocation: Needle in a Fey Stack, End chest

name: Lesser Boots of Striding and Springing
description: These magical boots enhance the wearer's running and jumping skills.
dropLocation: Stormcleave Outpost, Minotaur Lord Helos ' chest
_file: Lesser Boots of Striding and Springing.item

name: Lightning Railworker's Boots
description:
The perfect boots for those who wish to work hard and expect to withstand a
massive electric shock. Or ten. In one day.

name: Madstone Boots
description:
Madstone was formed when a draconic counterspell aborted the casting of the
Reaver's Bane, almost 40,000 years ago. Polished orbs of madstone have been
carefully worked into these boots, imbuing them with chaotic and dangerous
effects.
dropLocation: The Reaver's Fate, Raid Warded chest

name: Magma Waders
description: Stone boots that seem to absorb the heat.
dropLocation: The Trouble with Tar Pits, end chest

name: Many-Hooked Greaves
description:
These wicked boots allow you to snare the legs of your opponents and pin them
to the ground.
dropLocation: Defiler of the Just, Warded chest

name: Official Risia Ice Games Ice Skates
description:
These sturdy ice skates have enchanted blades that look like candy canes. In
addition to providing great ankle support, these skates allow you to glide
across icy surfaces with grace and aplomb... and get big air on the ski jump
in the Harbor during the Risia Ice Games! Try out the half pipe in House Phiarlan's
Bogwater Tavern too!
_file: Official Risia Ice Games Ice Skates.item

name: Orcish Privateer's Boots
description:
Believing them the finest of his personal effects, Orcish pirate Captain Dustdyn
last request was that he be put to sea in a burning bark, these boots upon
his feet. Unfortunately for him, his crew were every bit the scurrilous, thieving,
untrustworthy dogs that Captain Dustdyn had been himself, in life.

name: Osfield's Lightning Boots
description:
These boots must have belonged to someone else for quite some time. They seem
oddly charged with static electricity.
dropLocation: Skeletons in the Closet, Free Yarrow optional chest

name: Pathfinder's Boots
description: These boots are said to allow the wielder to move more swiftly.

name: Piston Boots
description: Crack the ground beneath your feet.
dropLocation: Too Hot to Handle, end chest

name: Red Dragonscale Boots
description:
These boots are crafted out of Red Dragonscale, and have an incredible tolerance
for heat.

name: Remlin's Step
description:
These magical boots are said to protect a lawful person from the effects of
chaotic creatures and allows the wielder to step quickly.

description:
These boots are encased in a stony shell, bolstered by the power of a bound
Earth Elemental. They allow the user to execute a ferocious stomp that knocks
nearby enimes over, as well as turning your attackers to stone on occasion.
dropLocation: Vaults of the Artificers, Turn in various ingredients

description:
Made from a soft, yet sturdy leather, these boots were used by stealthy hobgoblin
raiders to help maintain their footing on slick underground stone.
dropLocation: The Seal of Shan-To-Kor, End reward

name: Surefooted Boots (historic)
description:
Crafted by dwarves, these boots have a very sturdy look about them. They were
most recently worn by Gorn Gut-Chewer of the Wyrm-Cult Orcs.

name: Switchblade Boots
description:
The toes of these boots are fitted with spring-loaded blades, a nasty surprise
for the unwary opponent.

name: The Devouring Way
description: Walk the way of Wave and Whelm.
dropLocation: Vecna Unleashed, any legendary end chest or Vecna Unleashed (epic) saga end reward (Epic Hard or above)

name: The Furious Voyage
description: Walk the way of Rage and Ruin.
dropLocation: Vecna Unleashed, any legendary end chest or Vecna Unleashed (epic) saga end reward (Epic Hard or above)

name: The High Steps
description: These boots are enchanted to add a little spring to your step.

name: The Kept Descent
description: Walk the way of Death and Decay.
dropLocation: Vecna Unleashed, any legendary end chest or Vecna Unleashed (epic) saga end reward (Epic Hard or above)

name: The Mocking Passage
description: Walk the way of Betrayal and Bloodshed.
dropLocation: Vecna Unleashed, any legendary end chest or Vecna Unleashed (epic) saga end reward (Epic Hard or above)

name: The Repulsor Boots
description: These carry a subtle heat, as if they were still warm from the forge.
dropLocation: Legendary Lord of Blades, end chest

name: The Shadow Flight
description: Walk the way of Magic and Mayhem.
dropLocation: Vecna Unleashed, any legendary end chest or Vecna Unleashed (epic) saga end reward (Epic Hard or above)

name: The Shrouded Steps of the Beyond
description: Step through the veil and parting glass.
_file: The Shrouded Steps of the Beyond.item

description: Walk the way of Chaos and Change.
dropLocation: Vecna Unleashed, any legendary end chest or Vecna Unleashed (epic) saga end reward (Epic Hard or above)

name: Thief's Escape
description: For when one must go quickly.

name: Thorn Boots
description: A pair of boots with living vines and angry thorns wound around them.

name: Trailblazer's Footwraps
description: Subtle, but effective.

name: Treads of Falling Shadow (Level 16)
description:
These black leather boots seem to cause your shadow to warp and twist, almost
as if it were alive.

name: Warded Sewer Waders
description:
These boots help the user ward off sicknesses one might acquire in the sewers.
Given that they were dredged up from its depths without their user, they seem
less effective at warding off the sewers' inhabitants.

name: Windriders
description: Ride the wind.
dropLocation: Needle in a Fey Stack, End chest

name: Winter Boots
description:
While worn, these boots seem to keep out the winter's chill, leaving your feet
snug and warm, regardless of how low the temperature plummets.
dropLocation: Stopping the Sahuagin, Chest at Devourer altar near the Giantish device.
